message:
Add expat dependency to Nix build

The XML parsing functions require libexpat, which was missing from the
Nix package definition.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -131,9 +131,10 @@ find_package(c-ares REQUIRED)
 provide_find_module(c-ares)
 
 # -- expat (XML parsing) -------------------------------------------------------
+# Use MODULE mode to avoid broken CMake config in static Nix builds
 
-find_package(EXPAT REQUIRED)
-string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST "\nfind_package(EXPAT REQUIRED)")
+find_package(EXPAT REQUIRED MODULE)
+string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST "\nfind_package(EXPAT REQUIRED MODULE)")
 dependency_summary("expat" EXPAT::EXPAT "Dependencies")
 
 # -- jemalloc ------------------------------------------------------------------

@@ -54,6 +54,7 @@ let
       llhttp,
       pfs,
       c-ares,
+      expat,
       # Defaults to null because it is omitted for the developer edition build.
       tenzir-plugins-source ? null,
       extraPlugins ? [ ],
@@ -238,6 +239,7 @@ let
               })
               llhttp
               c-ares
+              expat
             ]
             ++ lib.optionals stdenv.isLinux [
               pfs
@@ -304,6 +306,9 @@ let
               "-DTENZIR_INSTALL_CMAKEDIR=${placeholder "dev"}/lib/cmake"
             ]
             ++ lib.optionals isStatic [
+              # Hint paths for FindEXPAT module (CMake uses MODULE mode)
+              "-DEXPAT_LIBRARY=${expat}/lib/libexpat.a"
+              "-DEXPAT_INCLUDE_DIR=${lib.getDev expat}/include"
               "-UCMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR"
               "-UCMAKE_INSTALL_SBINDIR"
               "-UCMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR"
